title: Permafrost Requiem
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In 2072, a thawologist in Siberia uncovers a frozen viral archive that could rewrite human immunity, but the government wants it weaponized and the only person who can help is a climate refugee she betrayed years ago.
long_description: In 2072, a thawologist in Siberia uncovers a frozen viral archive that could rewrite human immunity, but the government wants it weaponized and the only person who can help is a climate refugee she betrayed years ago.
